text: I am a Python developer with over six years of professional experience building backend systems, cloud infrastructure, and AI-integrated applications across industries including gaming, fintech, IoT, and human resources. Before that, I spent more than a decade teaching Electronics and Physics at university level — an experience that shaped how I approach complex problems: methodically, clearly, and always with the end user in mind.

In my recent roles I have led backend teams, reduced AWS infrastructure costs by over 30%, cut Docker build times in half, and integrated computer vision products into production systems. I am comfortable working across the full development lifecycle — from architecture decisions and code reviews to CI/CD automation and observability. I value clean code, testability, and well-defined boundaries between system components.

I am particularly drawn to roles where technical depth matters and where I can contribute meaningfully from day one. I work remotely from Patagonia, Argentina, and have done so successfully with distributed teams across the US, Europe, and Latin America.
Thank you for your time. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background fits your team's needs.
